required_documents.name: Levantamiento Topográfico
required_documents.rationale: Required for all projects — establishes site boundaries, levels, and contours. Site has slight slope; topographic data is essential for massing and drainage design.

required_documents.name: HOA Design Guidelines — Residencial Vista del Mar
required_documents.rationale: Required for residential_in_development projects. Client mentioned reglamento de construcción del fraccionamiento with contemporary style, natural stone/stucco facade, and 7m height limit restrictions. Full written guidelines needed for covenant compliance checklist.

required_documents.name: Escrituras / Property Title
required_documents.rationale: Required to confirm ownership and check for easements or restrictions not yet disclosed. Client confirmed ownership but document not yet received.
